claim_scope: rigorous prototype and feasibility study for patient-level seizure event detection; not a clinically validated detector or deployment claim
evaluation_scope: patient-level generalization; held-out patients are reserved for validation/test while train patients remain unseen in those splits

dataset_selection_policy.selected_session_policy: For local feasibility and enough positive windows, session selection prioritizes sessions with actual seizure overlap, then adds normal sessions for contrast.
dataset_selection_policy.selected_session_scope: The reported metrics are valid for the selected session-held-out experimental subset and should not be interpreted as natural seizure prevalence or prospective clinical performance.

model_provenance.checkpoint_policy: Existing variant checkpoints are ignored when FORCE_RERUN=1 or DETECTION_FORCE_RETRAIN_VARIANTS=1.

label_policy.offset_policy: use a second numeric column as offset when it is present and timestamp-like; otherwise use onset plus configured fixed duration; then merge overlapping/nearby intervals

sensor_policy.standard_mode: Base device: ACC x/y/z plus optional sensors from product_allocation_selection.selected_allocation.base_optional
sensor_policy.pro_mode: Base device plus required add-on PPG and optional sensors from product_allocation_selection.selected_allocation.addon_optional. The deployed Pro model uses the empirically selected active feature subset in pro_model_selection.selected_variant.
sensor_policy.full_sensor_candidate: Base ACC plus BVP, HR, EDA, and TEMP

excluded_ppg_outputs.IBI: excluded from active features because several IBI.csv files are empty/missing

sensor_policy.recommendation_policy: Choose the product allocation using imbalance-aware validation criteria at the same false-alarm budget; rank by recall gain, balanced-accuracy gain, Pro recall, AUC gain, and false-alarm reduction.

product_allocation_selection.test_split_role: final held-out reporting only, not product selection
product_allocation_selection.selection_metric: Recall gain, balanced-accuracy gain, Pro recall, AUC gain, and false-alarm reduction at the default false-alarm budget

selected_allocation.description: Base has ACC plus EDA; Pro keeps the base EDA signal and adds PPG plus TEMP.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

base_acc__addon_ppg_eda_temp.description: Base has ACC only; add-on has required PPG plus EDA and TEMP.

pro_score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

pro_score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

base_acc_temp__addon_ppg_eda.description: Base has ACC plus TEMP; Pro keeps the base TEMP signal and adds PPG plus EDA.

pro_score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

base_acc_eda_temp__addon_ppg.description: Base has ACC plus EDA and TEMP; Pro keeps those base signals and adds PPG.

pro_score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.
Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

matched_false_alarm_operating_point.policy: Pro threshold is calibrated on validation to match the Standard validation false-alarm/hour budget; both are then evaluated on held-out test sessions.

score_fusion.policy: Pro combines the Standard detector score with the add-on detector score; the blend weight is selected on validation only.

fixed_validation_alarm_budgets.policy: Each model gets its own threshold from validation to stay within the same false-alarms/hour budget, then both are evaluated on held-out test sessions.
